creator: kline@thought.org
text:
The graphics/xpm ports completes, installs; the windowmanager 
	port fails as shown:

make WITH_GNOME=yes
===>  Extracting for windowmaker-0.62.1

Fix: 

Dunno.  Either the wm port is broken, or the xpm is; they do not
	jibe.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try building x11-wm/windowmaker port on a virgin 4.1 system.
